title: Chinas Outstanding Loan Growth Has Set Another Record Low
section_path: Chinas Outstanding Loan Growth Has Set Another Record Low
section_path_text: Chinas Outstanding Loan Growth Has Set Another Record Low
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, Chinese banks issued 900 billion yuan in new loans in August. This has marked a month-on-month increase of 640 billion yuan (-246%) but is down year-on-year by 460 billion yuan (-34%. Through the first eight months of the year, new lending has declined year-on-year by 3.01 trillion yuan (-17%).
